REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2260 2264 Union Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Dec-07-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Thomas Lucas.

The sale was confirmed at $1,450,000.00. An additional bond in the amount of $1,378,000.00 is required. The Court granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
